title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, with experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR. Deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise needed, plus strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Finout is a cloud cost-management company backed by $85M+ in funding, with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York, trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft.
score_reason: Omri is an exceptional match for this Head of RevOps role—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM directly aligns with Finout's need for a seasoned operator to scale their go-to-market engine, and his Salesforce and pipeline forecasting expertise are core requirements. The only minor gap is the specific $30M+ ARR scaling experience, but his seniority level and fintech familiarity (cloud/FinOps is adjacent) make this highly addressable.
ai_opener: Omri—I came across Finout's impressive growth trajectory (backed by $85M+ and trusted by enterprise names like Wiz and The New York Times) and your Head of RevOps opening immediately stood out. With 15+ years building and scaling GTM operations in high-growth B2B SaaS—including deep Salesforce administration, revenue analytics, and cross-functional leadership—you're positioned to be exactly the operational architect the CRO needs to evolve Finout's go-to-market engine as you scale. I'd love to explore how your RevOps leadership could translate to the fintech/cloud-ops space.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: This role accelerates revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy, scalable territory design, and consultative partnership with business leaders. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or related GTM planning, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation, plus strong analytical skills in Excel, SQL, and BI tools like Tableau. Salesforce proficiency required; territory management tools (Fullcast, Pigment, Anaplan) a plus. Gong is a revenue intelligence platform with significant operations in Tel Aviv.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds 3-5 year requirement, deep RevOps/GTM expertise aligns perfectly with territory strategy focus, Salesforce proficiency confirmed, and Tel Aviv operations align with candidate's location preferences. Only minor gap is no explicit territory management tool experience mentioned.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've been impressed by Gong's revenue intelligence platform and its impact on B2B SaaS go-to-market execution. With 15+ years scaling revenue operations across multiple SaaS stages—from territory design and quota strategy to pipeline forecasting and sales ops infrastructure—I'm excited about the opportunity to drive seller productivity and data-driven territory optimization at Gong. Given your Tel Aviv hub, I'm particularly well-positioned as a remote-first operator in the region.

title: RevOps Manager
description: A builder role owning the technical infrastructure powering Instrumentl's revenue engine — architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading AI tool implementation across sales processes. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue, Sales, Marketing Operations, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, workflows, APIs), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience. Target salary band is $120,000–$170,000 plus equity. Instrumentl builds fundraising automation software for nonprofits and is cash-flow positive.
score_reason: Strong technical RevOps fit with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience exceeding the 3-5 year requirement, proven CRM architecture and data integration skills. Primary gap: Instrumentl's nonprofit/fundraising domain differs from Omri's fintech/AI-native GTM background, though the core RevOps builder skillset aligns exceptionally well.
ai_opener: I've been architecting revenue infrastructure at B2B SaaS companies for 15+ years, and Instrumentl's approach to building AI-native GTM systems resonates with where I've seen the highest-leverage RevOps work happen. Your focus on owning the technical data model and integrating AI tools across sales processes is exactly the kind of strategic RevOps engineering role I'm drawn to—and I've built similar HubSpot/data architecture foundations that scaled GTM motion significantly.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo seeks someone who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations that make the GTM team highly effective. The opportunity is to replace manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows — including learning lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work. Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, and is scaling rapidly in 2026.
score_reason: Strong alignment on GTM Engineer title, remote work, and AI-native tooling, but the role's emphasis on coding/shipping internal tools is atypical for a RevOps executive who typically leads strategy and processes rather than engineering. Good fit if Omri has technical depth; weaker if primarily process/operations focused.
ai_opener: Conveo's vision of replacing manual GTM workflows with AI-powered automation aligns perfectly with where enterprise GTM is heading. With 15+ years building RevOps engines at scale—from pipeline forecasting to lead scoring models—I'm excited by the opportunity to architect these systems from first principles, especially in a research platform context where data quality directly drives customer outcomes.

title: GTM Engineer
description: A foundational role for the GTM motion, owning the systems and signals behind identifying, segmenting, and reaching the ICP, and stitching BDR, marketing, and sales ops into one streamlined operation. Requires 5+ years in a rev ops, marketing ops, or sales ops role at an enterprise SaaS company, experience running account-based motions, a systems-building instinct, and fluency in tools like HubSpot, Clay, and Apollo. Strong AI fluency expected — comfortable building small agents and prompting daily. Focused on low-volume, high-quality multi-touch outbound to enterprise personas.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment across all dimensions: GTM Engineer role perfectly matches Omri's RevOps/GTM expertise, enterprise SaaS background, and systems-building focus. AI-native GTM requirement and HubSpot/Sales Ops stack are core strengths, with 15+ years far exceeding the 5+ year requirement.

Your GTM Engineer role caught my attention because I've built these exact systems, and I'm deeply invested in how AI agents are reshaping how we think about signal generation and account-based motions.
